scope: Scenario A/B/C/D kickoff across registryV2-known protocols. The goal is incremental coverage: complete Action-compatible items first, explicitly defer bridge/REST/perp or missing-ActionBody shapes instead of forcing them into wrong actions.

evidence: cargo test -p policy-engine-integration-tests --test v3_decode_harness -- --nocapture: 10 passed, 0 failed
cargo run -p policy-engine-integration-tests --bin v3-harness -- coverage: callkeys=489 typed_data_keys=44 unique_bundles=115 install_failures=0
cargo run -p policy-engine-integration-tests --bin v3-harness -- corpus: corpus 132/132 matched
cd registryV2 && npm run check:surface: PASS with 6 gated contracts

completed: surface/compound-v3/comet-usdc-mainnet.{abi,coverage}.json gates 20 external mutating selectors: 15 COVER, 5 EXCLUDE, signed_struct Authorization COVER
added missing Comet manifests for allow, allowBySig, approve, approveThis, buyCollateral, transfer, transferFrom, transferAsset, transferAssetFrom, and Authorization typed-data
added LendingAction::BuyCollateral and optional SetAuthorization.authorizer so Comet permission paths are not downgraded to Unknown
field-level golden tests pin allow, allowBySig, and Authorization permission fields
hand-encoded corpus covers every Comet COVER selector plus Authorization typed-data
scenario_b_new_protocol_onboarding.caveat: No ETHERSCAN_API_KEY was present in this checkout, so the Compound corpus is hand-encoded from verified ABI shape rather than imported real Etherscan txlist. The surface snapshot itself is committed and check:surface enforces triage completeness.

completed: added surface/compound-v3/comet-weth-mainnet.{abi,coverage}.json using Compound official mainnet/weth roots.json + configuration.json provenance and the CometInterface user-facing ABI
expanded Comet on-chain manifests from cUSDC-only to cUSDC+cWETH for 15 COVER selectors
added compound_v3_base_asset static resolver so cUSDC decodes with USDC base asset and cWETH decodes with WETH base asset
added cWETH Authorization typed-data manifest keyed by verifying_contract=0xa17581a9e3356d9a858b789d68b4d866e593ae94 and domain_name=Compound WETH
added field-level golden tests for cWETH supply base_asset and cWETH Authorization permission fields
added hand corpus entries for cWETH supply and cWETH Authorization typed-data
evidence: npm run build: 514 callkeys + 46 typed-data entries across 120 manifests
npm run check:surface: PASS with 8 gated contracts; Comet cWETHv3 20 surface / 15 cover / 5 exclude / 1 signed-struct
cargo run -p policy-engine-integration-tests --bin v3-harness -- corpus: 138/138 matched

classification: No hard FAIL/panic from the fresh synthetic run.
Remaining Uniswap real-traffic gaps already pinned as expect:error in data/golden/v3-decode/uniswap/corpus.json include UR V4 nested action-stream and V4 PositionManager/PoolManager cases.
Those remaining gaps need decoder/Tier-B work (nested V4 command stream, PoolKey/pool_id derivation, or new AMM variants), not a safe manifest-only patch.

completed: added Sourcify verified ABI snapshots and coverage files for Permit2 on chains 1, 10, 42161, and 8453
added missing uniswap/permit2/invalidateNonces manifest as token.revoke_approval with permit2_lockdown scope
fixed check-surface-completeness so dual calldata+typed-data manifests count as on-chain manifests when their selector matches the ABI function selector
added field-level golden test for invalidateNonces token/spender revoke scope
scenario_d_surface_gate.surface_gate: PASS; gated contracts increased from 2 to 6; remaining ungated WARN count decreased from 62 to 58

skipped_or_deferred_action_mapping.reason: Not an EVM calldata ActionBody route. Orders/cancels/usdSend/withdraw/approveAgent are HTTP JSON or typed off-chain protocol actions; they need the browser-extension safety layer or a dedicated Hyperliquid action model, not simulation/reducer calldata shapes.
Bridge semantics are not represented by the current ActionBody domains. Existing manifest preserves calldata/value as Unknown; no further surface-gate expansion was forced.

Fresh Sourcify ABI for the current ClaimLocal implementation differs from existing historical/proxy-era manifests and corpus labels. Needs proxy/history reconciliation before a trustworthy surface snapshot.
Dynamic array/tuple strategy gap. Current single_emit field paths cannot express the variable assets/amounts semantics without Tier-B strategy work.

skipped_or_deferred_action_mapping.protocol_or_function: Aave V3 flashLoan / L2 packed Pool args
skipped_or_deferred_action_mapping.reason: FlashLoan needs a dedicated lending flash-loan action and multi-asset mapping; L2 Pool packed bytes32 args require bit-slice/reserve-index decoding. Existing simple lending verbs remain covered by manifests.

Generic Permit2 signature-transfer authorizes a spender to transfer token amount without carrying recipient in the signed body. It needs a distinct ActionBody model; on-chain relayer execution is explicitly EXCLUDE in Permit2 surface coverage.

skipped_or_deferred_action_mapping.protocol_or_function: Uniswap Universal Router V4 nested action-stream
skipped_or_deferred_action_mapping.reason: Needs decoder/Tier-B support for V4_SWAP nested command streams and PoolKey-derived pool_id/currency fields. Existing corpus keeps expect:error until that decoder work lands.
